title: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <g fill='#C06C88' font-size='20' font-family='Arial, sans-serif'>
    <text x='20' y='30'>Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication</text>
    <text x='20' y='60'>with Query Playground</text>
  </g>
  <g fill='#411C56'>
    <rect x='120' y='140' width='100' height='20' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='120' y='170' width='100' height='20' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='120' y='200' width='100' height='20' rx='5'/>
    <circle cx='220' cy='140' r='10'/>
    <circle cx='220' cy='170' r='10'/>
    <circle cx='220' cy='200' r='10'/>
    <rect x='220' y='140' width='80' height='20' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='220' y='170' width='80' height='20' rx='5'/>
    <rect x='220' y='200' width='80' height='20' rx='5'/>
    <g transform='translate(280, 140) rotate(-45)'>
      <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='5'/>
      <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='5'/>
    </g>
    <g transform='translate(280, 170) rotate(-45)'>
      <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='5'/>
      <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='5'/>
    </g>
    <g transform='translate(280, 200) rotate(-45)'>
      <rect x='-10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='5'/>
      <rect x='10' y='-10' width='20' height='20' rx='5'/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a query playground to display available authentication methods.
Implement features for user input validation, session management, and a rich table with sorting and filtering.
The layout must adhere to the provided design mockup and utilize the specified color palette.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review the implementation of the query playground and its features.
